content: make a report on rise of llm

The rapid maturation of large language models (LLMs) represents a structural shift from theoretical research to enterprise-grade deployment. Driven by advancements in deep learning and artificial neural networks [fact_940], the integration of generative AI with foundational semantic technologies—specifically natural language processing (NLP) and the semantic web—has catalyzed a more sophisticated class of artificial intelligence [fact_670, fact_941].
